subject: session date
fact: The session takes place on Apr 5th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Apr 5th, 2026

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The party escaped a chaotic dinner at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: chaos erupting below them at the dinner table of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen was involved in a three-way confrontation at the dinner table.
source_quote: three-way confrontation they had so carefully engineered between Vraxen, Veperyd, and the High Inquisitor Veris

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd was involved in a three-way confrontation at the dinner table.
source_quote: three-way confrontation they had so carefully engineered between Vraxen, Veperyd, and the High Inquisitor Veris

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: High Inquisitor Veris was involved in a three-way confrontation at the dinner table.
source_quote: three-way confrontation they had so carefully engineered between Vraxen, Veperyd, and the High Inquisitor Veris

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas noted that their imp guide had vanished during the commotion.
source_quote: Akritas noted with unease that their imp guide had vanished somewhere in the commotion

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur worked the lift mechanism with practiced ease.
source_quote: his expert hands working the mechanism with such practiced ease

subject: lift bypass
fact: Felkur bypassed the lift access leaving no trace of their entry.
source_quote: his flawless work left no trace that anyone had passed through at all

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur mocked the 'Abyssal 23' operating system.
source_quote: mock the archaic 'Abyssal 23' operating system controlling it

subject: upper corridor
fact: The upper corridor had a floor covered in tiles that seemed innocent.
source_quote: upper corridor greeted them with an unsettling stillness, its floor covered in a series of tiles that seemed almost innocent at first glance

subject: trap detection
fact: Felkur identified a Glyph of Warding on the second tile before touching it.
source_quote: his fingers grazed the second tile—a Glyph of Warding that would have detonated in his face

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim cast a powerful enchantment to strip away magical concealment.
source_quote: Bramgrim called upon a powerful enchantment that stripped away all magical concealment

subject: trap revelation
fact: Bramgrim revealed that every tile corresponding to a prime number was a trap.
source_quote: every tile corresponding to a prime number was a trap waiting to be sprung

subject: corridor traversal
fact: The party stepped only on safe tiles to reach the vault door.
source_quote: Stepping only on the safe tiles, the party picked their way through the corridor and arrived at the vault door without a scratch

subject: stone golem
fact: A stone golem stood before the vault door, silent and immovable.
source_quote: Standing before that door, however, was a stone golem—silent, immovable, and utterly indifferent to reason or argument

subject: golem security
fact: Felkur determined the golem was keyed to recognize Vraxen by scent alone.
source_quote: the construct had been keyed to recognize Vraxen by scent alone

subject: scent extraction device
fact: Felkur produced a gadget for extracting unwanted flavors from his pack.
source_quote: Felkur reached into his pack and produced a small, peculiar gadget

subject: scent extraction
fact: Felkur extracted Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear.
source_quote: the Owlbear had been bouncing on Vraxen's table not long ago and had picked up the arcanaloth's scent in the process

subject: golem bypass
fact: The stone golem stepped aside after sensing the extracted scent.
source_quote: the stone golem stepped silently aside

subject: vault door
fact: The vault door was reinforced Mithril with three distinct locking mechanisms.
source_quote: Beyond the golem lay a reinforced Mithril door with three distinct locking mechanisms

subject: vault lockpick
fact: Felkur dispatched the physical lock with contemptuous ease.
source_quote: the first of which was a physical lock that Felkur dispatched with almost contemptuous ease

subject: vault chamber
fact: The vault chamber was temperature-controlled and kept at a constant chill.
source_quote: a temperature-controlled chamber kept at a constant chill

subject: soul coins
fact: The vault walls were lined with shelves bearing soul coins.
source_quote: walls lined floor to ceiling with shelves bearing soul coins

subject: infernal ledgers
fact: The vault walls were lined with shelves bearing infernal ledgers.
source_quote: walls lined floor to ceiling with shelves bearing soul coins, infernal ledgers, and contracts written in the language of devils

subject: devil contracts
fact: The vault walls were lined with shelves bearing contracts written in the language of devils.
source_quote: walls lined floor to ceiling with shelves bearing soul coins, infernal ledgers, and contracts written in the language of devils

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths rested on a pedestal beneath a crystal dome in the center of the room.
source_quote: At the center of the room, resting on a pedestal beneath a crystal dome, was the Lexicon of Oaths

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths was a massive tome bound in devil hide with pages made from processed souls.
source_quote: a massive tome bound in devil hide, its pages made from processed souls that glowed with an eerie inner light

subject: lexicon function
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths automatically updated itself with every infernal contract struck in Maerimydra.
source_quote: automatically updating itself with every infernal contract struck in Maerimydra

subject: trap confirmation
fact: Bramgrim confirmed the room held no further traps.
source_quote: Bramgrim confirmed through his enchanted sight that the room held no further traps

subject: contract discovery
fact: Felkur discovered Transaction 44781 in the Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: There, recorded in meticulous infernal script, was Transaction 44781

subject: Felkur's past sale
fact: The record showed a drunken Felkur Oldenwood sold a priceless artifact for forty-five gold pieces.
source_quote: one Felkur Oldenwood—intoxicated, identification verified, blood alcohol content noted at a remarkable 0.18%—had sold a priceless artifact to a fence named Limping Oric for the sum of forty-five gold pieces

subject: Watcher's Eye Brooch
fact: The artifact sold was the Watcher's Eye Brooch belonging to the wizards of the Brotherhood of the Cloak.
source_quote: The artifact in question was the Watcher's Eye Brooch belonging to the wizards of the Brotherhood of the Cloak

subject: divination trigger
fact: Felkur triggered an ability in the brooch that made its bearer impossible to locate through divination magic.
source_quote: triggering an ability that made its bearer impossible to locate through any form of divination magic

subject: Phantom Ghost legend
fact: The shadowy figure responsible for the theft became known as the Phantom Ghost in Mulmaster.
source_quote: the shadowy figure responsible had become known in Mulmaster as the Phantom Ghost—a legendary, untraceable ghost of a criminal

subject: Brotherhood of the Cloak
fact: The wizards of the Brotherhood of the Cloak descended into paranoia after failing to find the thief.
source_quote: The wizards of the Brotherhood of the Cloak, unable to find the thief through their most powerful scrying, had descended into paranoia

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass sold Felkur's information and placed a contract on the party.
source_quote: Maram il Vass had sold Felkur's information and placed a contract on the party to retrieve the very book they now held in their hands

subject: contract loophole
fact: Felkur identified that the contract was void if the Lexicon no longer contained his information.
source_quote: the contract obligating them to deliver the Lexicon was only binding so long as the book contained the information needed to identify him

subject: identity alteration
fact: Felkur replaced his own name in the Lexicon with that of Veris of Mulmaster.
source_quote: carefully altering his entry in the Lexicon and replacing his own name with that of Veris of Mulmaster

subject: Mulmaster
fact: Veris of Mulmaster is from a city in Faerûn on the Moonsea.
source_quote: Veris of Mulmaster, a city in Faerûn on the Moonsea

subject: Shard of Crystallized Faerzess
fact: Felkur pocketed the Shard of Crystallized Faerzess from the vault shelf.
source_quote: Felkur first pocketed the Shard of Crysalized Faerzess—a large, pure crystal sitting on the vault shelf that practically hummed with arcane potential

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas stared at Felkur in disbelief after he stole the shard.
source_quote: prompting Akritas to stare at him in disbelief

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear shook its head slowly at Felkur's theft.
source_quote: even the Owlbear to shake its head slowly

subject: framing plan
fact: Felkur added a forged entry attributing the theft of the Shard to the Phantom Ghost.
source_quote: He added a forged entry attributing the theft of the Shard to the Phantom Ghost

subject: hidden door
fact: Felkur located a hidden door in the vault wall.
source_quote: Felkur located a hidden door in the vault wall

subject: Spire peak
fact: The party emerged at the peak of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning through the hidden door.
source_quote: emerging at the peak of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: peak chamber
fact: The chamber at the peak was vast and open to the sky with poisonous clouds above.
source_quote: The chamber was vast and open to the sky, though the sky above offered nothing but poisonous clouds

subject: teleportation circle
fact: A twenty-foot diameter teleportation circle pulsed at the center of the peak chamber.
source_quote: At the center of the room pulsed a twenty-foot diameter teleportation circle

subject: portal recalibration
fact: Felkur began recalibrating the teleportation circle using Fae crystals.
source_quote: Felkur immediately set to work recalibrating it using the Fae crystals the party had collected

subject: Daein
fact: Daein planted himself against the iron door leading to the staircase.
source_quote: Daein and the Owlbear planted themselves against it

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas nocked an arrow to defend the staircase door.
source_quote: while Akritas nocked an arrow

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim stood ready to defend the staircase door.
source_quote: and Bramgrim stood ready

subject: golem approach
fact: The stone golem approached the door with a grinding sound.
source_quote: The unmistakable grinding of stone on stone announced the stone golem's approach

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: High Inquisitor Veris arrived behind the golem, visibly injured from the battle below.
source_quote: behind it came the furious voice of a visibly injured High Inquisitor Veris, bearing wounds from the three-way battle below

subject: Veris threat
fact: Veris screamed that he would have Felkur's head and have his revenge.
source_quote: screaming that he would not be framed, that he would have Felkur's head, and that he would have his revenge

subject: door breach
fact: Veris commanded the golem to tear the door from its hinges.
source_quote: Veris commanded it to tear the door from its hinges entirely—which it did, sending splinters of iron flying across the chamber

subject: golem shove
fact: Daein threw himself at the golem to shove it back through the opening.
source_quote: Daein threw himself at the golem in an attempt to shove it back through the opening

subject: owlbear attack
fact: The Owlbear launched itself at the golem and raked deep gouges into the stone.
source_quote: The Owlbear, undeterred, launched itself at the golem with its enchanted claws, raking deep gouges into the stone

subject: spectral guardians
fact: Bramgrim summoned spectral guardians that battered the golem and Veris.
source_quote: Bramgrim called upon a powerful ward, and spectral guardians erupted into being around him, swirling like a storm of divine fury that battered both the golem and Veris

subject: felkur invisibility
fact: Daein rendered Felkur invisible.
source_quote: Felkur, rendered invisible by Daein's magic

subject: eldritch cannon blast
fact: Felkur deployed his eldritch cannon and sent a blast of fire into the golem.
source_quote: deployed his eldritch cannon and sent a blast of fire roaring into the golem

subject: hunter's mark
fact: Akritas marked the golem with a hunter's mark and shot it.
source_quote: Akritas marked the construct with a hunter's mark and put an arrow into it with practiced precision

subject: portal stabilization
fact: Felkur installed the shattered nodes and rewired the Fae crystals into the portal mechanism.
source_quote: Felkur, even while the battle raged around him, managed to install the shattered nodes and rewire the Fae crystals into the portal mechanism

subject: veris teleport
fact: Veris teleported past the frontline and materialized inside the chamber.
source_quote: Veris, growing increasingly desperate and furious, teleported past the frontline entirely and materialized inside the chamber

subject: escape countdown
fact: Six more rounds stood between the party and their escape from the Spire.
source_quote: with six more agonizing rounds standing between the party and their escape from the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Maerimydra
fact: Maerimydra is a fire giant stronghold.
source_quote: A fire giant stronghold

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning is a tower within Maerimydra hosted by the arcanaloth Vraxen.
source_quote: A tower within Maerimydra hosted by the arcanaloth Vraxen

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is an arcanaloth and the host of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: An arcanaloth and host of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen's scent is required to bypass the stone golem guarding the vault.
source_quote: His scent is required to bypass the stone golem guarding the vault

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen's personal journal reveals plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors.
source_quote: reveals plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd is a fire giant infused with demonic blood.
source_quote: A fire giant infused with demonic blood

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd attended the dinner at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: who attended the dinner at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Veris
fact: Veris is a High Inquisitor of Mulmaster.
source_quote: A High Inquisitor of Mulmaster

subject: Veris
fact: Veris was secretly hunting Felkur.
source_quote: secretly hunting Felkur

subject: Veris
fact: Veris arrived at the door injured.
source_quote: An injured High Inquisitor Veris

subject: Veris
fact: Veris shouted threats of revenge and fury over the forgery left in the Lexicon.
source_quote: shouting threats of revenge and fury over the forgery left in the Lexicon

subject: Veris
fact: Veris teleported into the room to bypass the frontline defenders.
source_quote: Varexis teleports into the room to bypass the frontline defenders

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear is the party's loyal sidekick.
source_quote: The party's loyal sidekick

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear caused a commotion by jumping on the magical table during dinner.
source_quote: caused a commotion by jumping on the magical table during dinner

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear inadvertently picked up Vraxen's scent.
source_quote: inadvertently picking up Vraxen's scent

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear used his bulk to help block the staircase door.
source_quote: used his bulk to help block the staircase door

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear engaged the stone golem in melee with his magical claws.
source_quote: engaged the stone golem in melee with his magical claws

subject: Stone Golem
fact: A stone golem is a mindless magical construct guarding the vault door.
source_quote: A mindless magical construct guarding the vault door

subject: Stone Golem
fact: The stone golem guarding the vault requires Vraxen's scent to allow passage.
source_quote: requires Vraxen's scent to allow passage

subject: Stone Golem
fact: A second stone golem accompanied Varexis to the portal chamber.
source_quote: A second stone golem later accompanies Varexis to the portal chamber

subject: Stone Golem
fact: The stone golem smashed the iron door off its hinges to gain entry.
source_quote: smashing the iron door off its hinges to gain entry

subject: Limping Oric
fact: Limping Oric is a fence from Daggerford.
source_quote: A fence from Daggerford

subject: Limping Oric
fact: Limping Oric purchased a stolen artifact from a drunken Felkur for 45 gold pieces.
source_quote: purchased a stolen artifact from a drunken Felkur for 45 gold pieces

subject: Limping Oric
fact: Limping Oric could not remember who sold the brooch to him due to the brooch's magic.
source_quote: he could not remember who sold it to him

subject: Limping Oric
fact: Limping Oric inadvertently created the legend of the Phantom Ghost.
source_quote: inadvertently creating the legend of the Phantom Ghost

subject: The Glyph-Warded Corridor
fact: The Glyph-Warded Corridor is a 50-foot long hallway within the spire.
source_quote: A 50-foot long hallway within the spire

subject: The Glyph-Warded Corridor
fact: The floor of the corridor is covered in tiles, many of which are enchanted with Glyphs of Warding on tiles corresponding to prime numbers.
source_quote: floor is covered in tiles, many of which are enchanted with Glyphs of Warding on tiles corresponding to prime numbers

subject: The Vault of Oaths
fact: The Vault of Oaths is a 30-by-30-foot temperature-controlled chamber kept at a constant 55 degrees Fahrenheit.
source_quote: A 30-by-30-foot temperature-controlled chamber kept at a constant 55 degrees Fahrenheit

subject: The Vault of Oaths
fact: The walls of the Vault of Oaths are lined with shelves containing soul coins and infernal ledgers.
source_quote: walls are lined with shelves containing soul coins and infernal ledgers

subject: The Vault of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths rests on a central pedestal beneath a crystal dome in the Vault of Oaths.
source_quote: with the Lexicon of Oaths resting on a central pedestal beneath a crystal dome

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning Peak
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning Peak is a 60-foot diameter chamber at the top of the tower.
source_quote: A 60-foot diameter chamber at the top of the tower

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning Peak
fact: The chamber at the peak is open to poisonous clouds above.
source_quote: open to poisonous clouds above

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning Peak
fact: The peak features a 20-foot diameter permanent teleportation circle glowing with sickly green energy.
source_quote: featuring a 20-foot diameter permanent teleportation circle glowing with sickly green energy

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning Peak
fact: There is a single iron door leading to the interior staircase at the peak.
source_quote: and a single iron door leading to the interior staircase

subject: Stolen Key
fact: Daein took a key from the obsidian table during the dinner at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: A key taken by Daein from the obsidian table during the dinner

subject: Stolen Key
fact: The stolen key was used to access the lift and upper levels of the tower.
source_quote: used to access the lift and upper levels of the tower

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is a massive tome bound in devil hide and stitched together.
source_quote: A massive tome bound in devil hide and stitched together

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The pages of the Lexicon of Oaths are made from processed souls that glow with an inner light.
source_quote: pages made from processed souls that glow with an inner light

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths automatically records and updates all infernal contracts in Maerimydra.
source_quote: It automatically records and updates all infernal contracts in Maerimydra

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths contained the record of Felkur's drunken sale of a priceless artifact.
source_quote: it contained the record of Felkur's drunken sale of a priceless artifact

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: Felkur altered the entry in the Lexicon of Oaths regarding the artifact sale.
source_quote: an entry Felkur subsequently altered

fact: The Watcher's Eye Brooch is a priceless artifact belonging to the wizards of the Brotherhood of the Cloak.
source_quote: A priceless artifact belonging to the wizards of the Brotherhood of the Cloak

subject: The Watcher's Eye Brooch
fact: Felkur unknowingly stole the Watcher's Eye Brooch while drunk.
source_quote: Felkur unknowingly stole while drunk

subject: The Watcher's Eye Brooch
fact: Felkur sold the Watcher's Eye Brooch to Limping Oric for 45 gold.
source_quote: sold to Limping Oric for 45 gold

subject: The Watcher's Eye Brooch
fact: Felkur's drunken fiddling accidentally activated the special ability of the Watcher's Eye Brooch.
source_quote: His drunken fiddling accidentally activated its special ability

subject: The Watcher's Eye Brooch
fact: The Watcher's Eye Brooch makes the wearer impervious to being located by divination magic.
source_quote: making the wearer impervious to being located by divination magic

subject: Shard of crystallized Faerzess
fact: A large, pure crystal found in the vault was pocketed by Felkur.
source_quote: A large, pure crystal found in the vault and pocketed by Felkur

subject: Shard of crystallized Faerzess
fact: The Shard of crystallized Faerzess functions like a wand of the mage for an artificer's abilities.
source_quote: It functions like a wand of the mage for an artificer's abilities

subject: Shard of crystallized Faerzess
fact: The Shard of crystallized Faerzess grants a bonus to any artificer ability used.
source_quote: granting a bonus to any artificer ability used

subject: Faerzess Crystals from Singed Veil
fact: The party collected specialized arcane crystals from Singed Veil prior to this session.
source_quote: Specialized arcane crystals collected by the party prior to this session

subject: Faerzess Crystals from Singed Veil
fact: Felkur used the Faerzess Crystals from Singed Veil to recalibrate the permanent teleportation circle at the spire's peak.
source_quote: used by Felkur to recalibrate the permanent teleportation circle at the spire's peak

subject: Scent Extraction Mechanism
fact: The Scent Extraction Mechanism is one of Felkur's personal gadgets.
source_quote: One of Felkur's personal gadgets

subject: Scent Extraction Mechanism
fact: The Scent Extraction Mechanism was originally kept to extract unpleasant flavors from food.
source_quote: originally kept to extract unpleasant flavors from food

subject: Scent Extraction Mechanism
fact: Felkur used the Scent Extraction Mechanism to extract Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear.
source_quote: Used here to extract Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear

subject: Eldritch Cannon
fact: The Eldritch Cannon is a magical device deployed by Felkur during the portal chamber battle.
source_quote: A magical device deployed by Felkur during the portal chamber battle

subject: Eldritch Cannon
fact: The Eldritch Cannon fires blasts of fire at enemies.
source_quote: fires blasts of fire at enemies

subject: Magical Mandolin
fact: The Magical Mandolin is an instrument belonging to Daein.
source_quote: An instrument belonging to Daein

subject: Magical Mandolin
fact: Daein used the Magical Mandolin to channel magic.
source_quote: used to channel magic

subject: Magical Mandolin
fact: Daein employed the Magical Mandolin to cast an invisibility spell on Felkur during the portal chamber battle.
source_quote: specifically employed to cast an invisibility spell on Felkur during the portal chamber battle

subject: Secret door discovery
fact: The party located a secret door within the vault.
source_quote: The party locates a secret door within the vault

subject: Vault escape
fact: The party escaped the vault before the stone golem's fail-safe security reactivated.
source_quote: escapes before the stone golem's fail-safe security reactivates

subject: Climbing to the peak
fact: The adventurers climbed to the peak of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: The adventurers climb to the peak of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Teleportation circle encounter
fact: The party encountered a 20-foot diameter permanent teleportation circle glowing with sickly green energy.
source_quote: They encounter a 20-foot diameter permanent teleportation circle glowing with sickly green energy

subject: Portal recalibration start
fact: Felkur began the complex process of recalibrating the teleportation circle using Fae's C crystals.
source_quote: Felkur begins the complex process of recalibrating the teleportation circle using Fae's C crystals

subject: Felkur hacking
fact: Felkur began a complex hacking process to recalibrate the teleportation circle requiring intense concentration and multiple arcane adjustments over ten rounds.
source_quote: Felkur begins a complex hacking process to recalibrate the teleportation circle, requiring intense concentration and multiple arcane adjustments over ten rounds

subject: Door blocking
fact: Daein and the Owlbear positioned themselves to block the single iron door leading to the staircase.
source_quote: Daein and the Owlbear position themselves to block the single iron door leading to the staircase

subject: Akritas preparing
fact: Akritas prepared her bow to strike anything that emerged from the stairwell.
source_quote: Akritas prepares her bow to strike anything that emerges from the stairwell

subject: Veris and golem arrival
fact: An injured High Inquisitor Veris and a stone golem arrived at the door.
source_quote: An injured High Inquisitor Veris and a stone golem arrive at the door

subject: Golem door attempt
fact: The stone golem attempted to force the door open but was initially held back.
source_quote: The stone golem attempts to force the door open but is initially held back

subject: Door destruction
fact: Veris commanded the golem to rip the door off its hinges, causing it to smash through.
source_quote: Veris commands the golem to rip the door off its hinges, causing it to smash through

subject: Daein shove attempt
fact: Daein attempted to shove the stone golem but failed to move the massive construct.
source_quote: Daein attempts to shove the stone golem but fails to move the massive construct

subject: Owlbear melee engagement
fact: The Owlbear engaged the stone golem in melee, striking it with its magical claws.
source_quote: The Owlbear engages the stone golem in melee, striking it with its magical claws

subject: Spirit Guardians cast
fact: Bramgrim cast Spirit Guardians, summoning spectral spirits that swirl around the enemies and deal significant damage to both the golem and Varexis.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts Spirit Guardians, summoning spectral spirits that swirl around the enemies and deal significant damage to both the golem and Varexis

subject: Felkur invisibility and cannon
fact: Felkur, rendered invisible, deployed his eldritch cannon to blast the stone golem with fire.
source_quote: Felkur, rendered invisible, deploys his eldritch cannon to blast the stone golem with fire

subject: Akritas marks golem
fact: Akritas marked the stone golem with Hunter's Mark and struck it with a well-aimed shot.
source_quote: Akritas marks the stone golem with Hunter's Mark and strikes it with a well-aimed shot

subject: Portal stabilization
fact: Felkur successfully installed shattered nodes and re-hardwired the crystals into the portal mechanism, stabilizing the teleportation sequence.
source_quote: Felkur successfully installs shattered nodes and re-hardwires the crystals into the portal mechanism, stabilizing the teleportation sequence

subject: Varexis teleportation
fact: Varexis teleported into the room to bypass the frontline defenders as the battle intensified.
source_quote: Varexis teleports into the room to bypass the frontline defenders as the battle intensifies

subject: Session end
fact: The session ended mid-combat on round 4, with 6 rounds remaining before the portal was fully recalibrated.
source_quote: The session ends mid-combat on round 4, with 6 rounds remaining before the portal is fully recalibrated

subject: True Seeing
fact: Bramgrim cast True Seeing to see through illusions and magical concealment.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim to see through illusions and magical concealment

subject: True Seeing
fact: True Seeing was used first to identify which tiles in the corridor were trapped with Glyphs of Warding.
source_quote: Used first to identify which tiles in the corridor were trapped with Glyphs of Warding

subject: True Seeing
fact: True Seeing was maintained into the vault to confirm the room was free of additional traps and to help locate a secret door.
source_quote: and maintained into the vault to confirm the room was free of additional traps and to help locate a secret door

subject: Glyph of Warding
fact: Glyphs of Warding are magical traps placed on specific floor tiles in the corridor corresponding to prime numbers.
source_quote: A magical trap placed on specific floor tiles in the corridor corresponding to prime numbers

subject: Glyph of Warding
fact: Glyphs of Warding are designed to explode if stepped upon by unauthorized individuals.
source_quote: designed to explode if stepped upon by unauthorized individuals

subject: Glyph of Warding
fact: Glyphs of Warding were detected by Felkur's investigation and later fully revealed by Bramgrim's True Seeing.
source_quote: Detected by Felkur's investigation and later fully revealed by Bramgrim's True Seeing

subject: Sanctuary
fact: Bramgrim cast Sanctuary on Felkur to prevent enemies from targeting the gnome with direct melee attacks.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim on Felkur to prevent enemies from targeting the gnome with direct melee attacks

subject: Sanctuary
fact: Sanctuary was cast while Felkur concentrated on recalibrating the teleportation circle.
source_quote: while he concentrated on recalibrating the teleportation circle

subject: Invisibility
fact: Daein cast Invisibility using his magical mandolin to hide Felkur from sight.
source_quote: Cast by Daein using his magical mandolin to hide Felkur from sight

subject: Invisibility
fact: Invisibility allowed the gnome to work on the portal's mechanisms from behind a pillar without being easily targeted.
source_quote: allowing the gnome to work on the portal's mechanisms from behind a pillar without being easily targeted

subject: Spirit Guardians
fact: Bramgrim cast Spirit Guardians at fifth level, summoning spectral guardians that swirled around both the stone golem and Varexis.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim at fifth level, summoning spectral guardians that swirled around both the stone golem and Varexis

subject: Spirit Guardians
fact: Spirit Guardians forced the stone golem and Varexis to make Wisdom saving throws.
source_quote: forcing them to make Wisdom saving throws

subject: Spirit Guardians
fact: Spirit Guardians dealt significant damage to the golem while Varexis resisted partially.
source_quote: and dealing significant damage to the golem while Varexis resisted partially

subject: Hunter's Mark
fact: Akritas placed a mystical brand on the stone golem with Hunter's Mark.
source_quote: A mystical brand placed by Akritas on the stone golem

subject: Hunter's Mark
fact: Hunter's Mark increased the damage of Akritas's strikes against the stone golem.
source_quote: to increase the damage of her strikes against it

subject: Portal recalibration
fact: The portal recalibration requires six more rounds to complete after round 4.
source_quote: with 6 rounds remaining before the portal is fully recalibrated

subject: Varexis confrontation
fact: Varexis has teleported into the room to confront the party directly.
source_quote: Varexis teleports into the room to bypass the frontline defenders

subject: Phantom Ghost legend
fact: The legend of the Phantom Ghost was inadvertently created by the magic of the Watcher's Eye Brooch.
source_quote: inadvertently creating the legend of the Phantom Ghost

subject: Vraxen's betrayal
fact: Vraxen's journal reveals plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors.
source_quote: reveals plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors
